About the team
Zillow’s Preferred Strategy & Insights team helps shape the future of the selling experience by turning data into decisions across our for-sale partner program. This team works closely with partners across Product, Operations, Sales, Marketing, and Finance to improve the seller journey, inform strategy, and support solutions that help more customers move with confidence.

About the role

As a Senior Business Intelligence Analyst, you will help drive strategy for Zillow’s Preferred Seller business by translating complex data into clear recommendations and measurable action. You’ll partner across teams to identify growth opportunities, improve conversion and operational performance, and shape the reporting, forecasting, and insights that guide business decisions.

You Will Get To

Define and track key success metrics across the Preferred Seller journey to measure performance and identify growth opportunities.

Own core business reporting, dashboards, forecasts, and weekly, monthly, and quarterly reviews to inform stakeholders and executive leadership.

Lead A/B tests, pilots, and experiments to evaluate performance and guide data-driven decisions.

Use data to uncover trends and opportunities that improve seller conversion, sales performance, and operational efficiency across the seller and buyer funnels.

Partner with leaders across Product, Operations, Sales, Marketing, and Finance to turn business questions into actionable analysis and recommendations.

Work with Engineering, Data, and business stakeholders to define requirements and build scalable datasets, models, and analytic solutions.
